name: codex-flows-remote-control
description: Operate remote Codex workspaces from a local Codex App over SSH.

interface.shortDescription: Use local Codex App remote connections for SSH-backed codex-flows.
interface.longDescription: codex-flows remote control installs hookless operator skills for a local Codex App to discover managed remote connections, run SSH-backed codex-flows commands against remote workspaces through the remote-agent provider, inspect Codex remote-control status, and start turns in remote workspaces.
defaultPrompt: Discover my Codex App remote connections and run codex-flows over SSH.
Check whether my remote codex-flows agent is reachable.
Start a Codex turn in the remote workspace.
Build a local Vite dashboard for a remote workspace over SSH.
